description: A retailer claims they never received a shipment. A support agent must provide the proof of delivery.

nodes.task_description: Identify the order in question and its tracking number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the order and tracking number.

nodes.task_description: Look up the tracking number on the carrier's website to retrieve the proof of delivery document.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the POD, which includes a signature from the retailer's employee.

nodes.task_description: Send the proof of delivery document to the retailer to resolve the claim.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully emails the POD to the customer.
